messages.content: 请翻译人工智能技术在中国的应用逐年增多，2016至2020年的增长速度比较快，并且在2020年达到应用峰值，2022年的回落是由于数据收集截止到2022年3月。

The application of artificial intelligence technology in China has been increasing year by year, with a relatively fast growth rate from 2016 to 2020, and reaching its peak in 2020. The decline in 2022 is due to the fact that data collection ended in March 2022.
请翻译人工智能技术在中国的应用逐年增多，2016至2020年的增长速度比较快，并且在2020年达到应用峰值，2022年数量的回落是受到数据的限制（数据仅收集到2022年3月）。

The application of artificial intelligence technology in China has been increasing year by year, with a relatively fast growth rate from 2016 to 2020, and reaching its peak in 2020. The decline in the number of applications in 2022 is due to data limitations, as data was only collected up to March 2022.
将 数量的变化，成熟度水平的变化，典型行业的变化翻译成排比的形式

数量的变化、成熟度水平的变化和典型行业的变化，可以排比地描述如下：

数量上逐年增多，2016至2020年的增长速度比较快，并且在2020年达到应用峰值；到了2022年，由于数据收集截止到3月，数量出现了回落。

与此同时，人工智能技术的成熟度水平也在不断提升，经历了从初始阶段到探索阶段，再到应用阶段的发展过程。

在典型行业方面，人工智能技术的应用也呈现出不同的变化趋势。例如，以金融行业为例，从财务管理方面的应用到更加细分的风控、智能客服等领域的应用，人工智能技术的应用呈现出多样化的趋势。在制造业方面，人工智能技术也在逐步应用于工业设计、智能维修等领域，提高了生产效率和产品质量。
翻译数量的变化，成熟度水平的变化，典型行业的变化

The changes in the application of artificial intelligence technology in China can be classified into three categories: quantity, maturity level, and typical industries.

In terms of quantity, the application of artificial intelligence technology has been increasing year by year. The growth rate was particularly high from 2016 to 2020, with the peak year being 2020. However, there was a decline in the number of applications in 2022, as data collection was only available until March.

In terms of maturity level, the application of artificial intelligence technology has gone through several stages, starting from the early stage to the exploration stage and then to the application stage. The maturity level of artificial intelligence technology in China has been continuously improving.

Regarding typical industries, the application of artificial intelligence technology has shown diverse trends. In the finance industry, for instance, the application of artificial intelligence technology has expanded from financial management to more specialized areas such as risk management and intelligent customer service. In the manufacturing industry, artificial intelligence technology has been used in areas such as industrial design and intelligent maintenance, improving production efficiency and product quality.

翻译技术应用成熟度的最高水平呈现一个攀升到稳定的过程。从最大值与最小值来说，除了2018年，对于人工智能技术的应用一直存在两极分化。2016-2018年是企业主动寻求数字化转型的过程，新冠疫情爆发，尤其是在2019-2020年，出于连续生产的目的，企业不得不进行数字化转型。在2019年存在一个较大的回落，2020年开始逐渐回升。从众数的角度分析，除去2019年其余年份人工智能技术成熟度的超过50%都趋向6级。由于收集的案例行业集中于制造业，因此我们对制造业中人工智能技术的应用情况进行单独分析。制造业的技术应用情况与全行业的技术应用状况变化趋势既有相同之处，又有不同之处。在2016年至2018年，有关技术应用的状况呈现出逐年上升的状态，2018年至2019年则出现大幅度降低。2020年至2022年出现回暖迹象。从图8可以看出在2016年至2018年人工智能技术应用状况整体向好，从而可以起到技术应用示范的效果；在2020年至2022年，技术应用平均分布在4级左右，这反映出人工智能技术在制造业中的应用正在逐年扩张。

The highest level of technology application maturity has shown an upward trend towards stability. There has been a polarization in the application of artificial intelligence technology, except for 2018, with the maximum and minimum values. From 2016 to 2018, companies actively sought digital transformation. With the outbreak of the COVID-19 pandemic, especially from 2019 to 2020, companies had to carry out digital transformation for the sake of continuous production. There was a significant decline in 2019, which gradually recovered from 2020 onwards. From the mode perspective, the maturity level of artificial intelligence technology in years other than 2019 tended to be level 6, with more than 50% of cases falling in this category.

As the collected case studies were mainly from the manufacturing industry, we conducted a separate analysis of the application of artificial intelligence technology in this industry. The application of technology in the manufacturing sector has shown both similarities and differences compared to the entire industry. From 2016 to 2018, the application of technology increased year by year, followed by a substantial decline from 2018 to 2019. There were signs of a rebound from 2020 to 2022. From Figure 8, it can be seen that the application of artificial intelligence technology was generally improving from 2016 to 2018, demonstrating the effect of technology application demonstration. From 2020 to 2022, the application of technology averaged around level 4, reflecting the expanding application of artificial intelligence technology in the manufacturing industry year by year.
你是一个英文学术论文写作专家，以下是一篇学术论文中的一段内容，请先对其进行翻译为英文，并将此部分润色以满足学术标准，提高语法、清晰度和整体可读性：预测性维护的成熟度可以在一定程度上反馈工业人工智能技术的成熟度。

The maturity of predictive maintenance serves as an indicator of the maturity of industrial artificial intelligence technology to some extent. 

(润色后) The maturity level of predictive maintenance can serve as an indicator of the maturity level of industrial artificial intelligence technology to a certain extent.
你是一个英文学术论文写作专家，以下是一篇学术论文中的一段内容，请先对其进行翻译为英文，并将此部分润色以满足学术标准，提高语法、清晰度和整体可读性：因此，对工业人工智能技术成熟度的评价可以立足于预测性维护的应用案例。

Therefore, the evaluation of the maturity level of industrial artificial intelligence technology can be based on the application cases of predictive maintenance.

(润色后) Hence, the evaluation of the maturity level of industrial artificial intelligence technology can be established upon the foundation of application cases of predictive maintenance.

你是一个英文学术论文写作专家，以下是一篇学术论文中的一段内容，请将其进行整合提炼成三句话，总字数不超过500，并将此部分润色以满足学术标准，提高语法、清晰度和整体可读性：Industrial artificial intelligence (Industrial AI) was first introduced by Prof.Jay Lee. Industrial AI is a scientific discipline, which focuses on developing, validating, and deploying various machine learning algorithms for industrial applications with sustainable performance. It acts as a systematic methodology and discipline to provide solutions for industrial applications and function as a bridge connecting academic research outcomes in AI to industry practitioners.As industrial technology has developed, it has focused on increasing efficiency, reliability, reducing costs, and ensuring quality. More emphasis is placed on predictive maintenance and productivity management. Predictive maintenance will become the “Killer Applications” of Industrial AI.

Introduced by Prof. Jay Lee, Industrial AI is a scientific discipline aimed at developing and deploying sustainable machine learning algorithms for industrial applications. By functioning as a bridge connecting AI research outcomes to industry practitioners, it provides a systematic methodology and discipline for providing solutions. As industrial technology evolves, there is increasing focus placed on predictive maintenance and productivity management, making predictive maintenance the "Killer Application" of Industrial AI.

你是一个英文学术论文写作专家，以下是一篇学术论文中的一段内容，请将其进行整合提炼成一句话，总字数不超过300，并将此部分润色以满足学术标准，提高语法、清晰度和整体可读性：Industrial artificial intelligence (Industrial AI) was first introduced by Prof.Jay Lee. Industrial AI is a scientific discipline, which focuses on developing, validating, and deploying various machine learning algorithms for industrial applications with sustainable performance. It acts as a systematic methodology and discipline to provide solutions for industrial applications and function as a bridge connecting academic research outcomes in AI to industry practitioners.As industrial technology has developed, it has focused on increasing efficiency, reliability, reducing costs, and ensuring quality.

Industrial AI, introduced by Prof. Jay Lee, is a scientific discipline that develops and deploys machine learning algorithms for sustainable industrial applications, serving as a bridge connecting AI research to the industry, and providing systematic solutions for increasing efficiency, reliability, reducing costs, and ensuring quality.
你是一个英文学术论文写作专家，以下是一篇学术论文中的一段内容，请先对其进行翻译为英文，并将此部分润色以满足学术标准，提高语法、清晰度和整体可读性：技术应用在区域和行业也存在一定规律。

There are certain patterns in the application of technology across regions and industries.

(润色后) Certain patterns can be observed in the application of technology across different regions and industries.
这句英文Certain patterns can be observed in the application of technology across  regions and between industries.有没有语法错误，若有，请改正
这句英文没有语法错误。它可以表达出在不同区域和行业中，技术应用存在一定的规律或相似性。
